title: Understanding EQC Changes in 2026
snippet: The Earthquake Commission has increased its cap to $300,000+GST for residential buildings, providing enhanced protection for homeowners. Learn how the latest changes affect your buildings insurance strategy.

title: How Climate Change Affects NZ Home Insurance
snippet: Rising sea levels and extreme weather events are reshaping the NZ insurance landscape. Insurers are adjusting premiums and coverage as climate impacts become more visible.

title: New Building Code Requirements for 2026
snippet: Updated building standards mean better protection but potentially higher reconstruction costs. Understanding new code requirements helps ensure your insurance is adequate.

title: Average Buildings Insurance Costs Across NZ Regions
snippet: Premiums vary significantly by region, with Wellington and Canterbury showing higher costs due to natural disaster risk. Regional variations can exceed $500 per year.
